query:
SELECT 
  id,
  name,
  totalAmount,
  quotationId,
  CASE WHEN quotationId IS NULL THEN 'SIN COTIZACIÓN' ELSE 'CON COTIZACIÓN' END as tipo
FROM projects 
WHERE deletedAt IS NULL AND dataOrigin = 'manual'
ORDER BY totalAmount DESC;

SELECT 
  CASE WHEN quotationId IS NULL THEN 'SIN COTIZACIÓN' ELSE 'CON COTIZACIÓN' END as tipo,
  COUNT(*) as cantidad,
  SUM(CAST(totalAmount AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as total
FROM projects 
WHERE deletedAt IS NULL AND dataOrigin = 'manual'
GROUP BY quotationId IS NULL
